details: Explicit finite ends remained unchanged across later state and knowledge writes; overlap truncation and same-start revision semantics passed.
AI mutations and foreign Version, Entity, EvidenceAnchor and logicalBlock sources were rejected.
Present-role multi-location conflicts, dependency cycles and definitely out-of-order dependencies were rejected without hard decisions for approximate or unknown time.
knows, believes, suspects, misunderstands and unknown persisted with chapter-effective history and invalidation.
A confirmed KnowledgeState retained its stable logicalBlock source identifier after the Draft block was deleted.
All seven named IPC commands rejected untrusted or malformed calls and forwarded validated payloads exactly once.
The real Electron process created source data, wrote EntityState, TimelineEvent and KnowledgeState, returned counts [1,1,1], and displayed all records in the ledger UI. E2E run completed 18/18 tests.
Final main commit bd9a1a0db768d9be8dbaa9bb1a0543754dcac40d passed Main Verification run 29722417080.
